LANDroid Sales Deck

Native status slides for current product story, recent progress, and next milestones. Legacy pitch assets remain available below the slide controls.

Slide 1 / 10
Open PDF
Download PowerPoint
01 / OVERVIEW
LANDroid is a working title and lease review cockpit
02 / WORKFLOW PAIN
Land review breaks when evidence, math, and status live apart
03 / CURRENT PRODUCT
The POC is now broad enough to show real workflow gravity
04 / DESK MAP
Desk Map shows the title story as a living, auditable tree
05 / LEASEHOLD
Leasehold keeps payout review separate from title-chain editing
06 / DOCUMENTS
The document registry is becoming the trust layer
07 / AI DIRECTION
AI is useful only when it stays contextual, reviewable, and gated
08 / HOSTED POC
The hosted POC has a clear deploy boundary
09 / RECENT PROGRESS
Recent work tightened reset safety, hosted AI context, and deck readiness
10 / NEXT MILESTONES
The near-term path is document trust, import hardening, and hosted verification

OVERVIEW

LANDroid is a working title and lease review cockpit

The app now combines title-tree mapping, leasehold review, document registry work, map references, research records, and hosted AI scaffolding in one signed-in workspace.

Texas oil-and-gas title math is the active production baseline.
Desk Map remains the title source of truth; Leasehold consumes it for acreage, royalty, ORRI, WI, NPRI, and transfer-order review.
The hosted POC gives the product a real review environment while preserving local-first workspace behavior.

LANDROID

Status deck for live product conversations

ACTIVE SURFACES

11

Desk Map, Leasehold, Documents, Owners, Maps, AI, and more

UP NEXT

Land review breaks when evidence, math, and status live apart
